sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: CRH 2026 1분기 총매출 전년 대비 9% 성장, 조정 EBITDA 18% 증가; FY26 가이던스 재확인

keyPoints.text: 1분기 총매출이 74억 달러로 전년(68억 달러) 대비 9% 성장하며 양호한 조기 시즌 수요와 인수 기여가 실적을 견인했다.
조정 EBITDA는 6억 달러(전년 5억 달러)로 18% 증가해 운영 효율성 개선과 인수 효과를 반영했으며, 조정 EBITDA 마진은 8.0%로 전년 대비 70bps 상승했다.
경영진은 지정학·거시적 불확실성에도 주요 시장의 기초 수요 견조세를 강조하며 FY26 재무 가이던스를 재확인했다.

businessChanges.text: Americas Materials Solutions 부문 매출이 전년 1분기 대비 21% 성장하고 조정 EBITDA는 75% 급증하며 그룹 성장을 주도했다.
비핵심 사업 3곳의 전략적 매각과 Axius Water 등 9건의 인수를 통해 고성장·연결 포트폴리오로 자본 재배치를 지속했다.
주당 분기 배당 0.39달러(전년 대비 +5%)를 선언하고 추가 자사주 매입도 병행하며 주주 환원을 이어갔다.

financialHighlights.text: 총매출 74억 달러(+9% YoY), 조정 EBITDA 6억 달러(+18% YoY)로 성장세가 두드러졌다.
순손실은 계절성으로 인해 발생했으며, 희석 주당손실은 0.27달러(손상 제외 기준 0.20달러)로 집계됐다.
Americas Building Solutions 부문 매출은 주거 신규 건설 수요 부진과 악천후 영향으로 전년 1분기 대비 소폭 감소했다.

watchItems.text: Americas Materials Solutions의 강한 성장(매출 +21%, EBITDA +75%)이 나머지 분기에도 지속될지, 그리고 비핵심 자산 매각 완료 후 포트폴리오 재편이 전체 마진에 미치는 영향을 주목할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q1resultsannouncement2026.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 CRH Reports First Quarter 2026 Results • Strong performance backed by our superior strategy, unmatched scale and connected portfolio • Total revenues +9% YoY; good early-season project activity, discip lined commercial execution and acquisition contributions • Active portfolio management; reallocating capital for higher growth and continuing to build a connected portfolio • $1.9bn of strategic divestitures 1 agreed across three non-core businesses • Investing $0.9bn in nine value-accretive acquisitions; including Axius Water 1 , further strengthening high-growth platform • Declaring quarterly dividend of $0.39 per share (+5% YoY); further $0.3bn share buyback • Outlook positive; expecting another year of growth and shareholder value creation • Reaffirming guidance; expect FY26 Net income of $3.9bn to  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.9 = 1.9달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러; $0.39 = 0.39달러; $0.3 = 0.3달러; $3.9 = 3.9달러; $4.1 = 4.1달러.

of $8.1bn to $8.5bn NEW YORK (Apr. 30, 2026) – CRH (NYSE: CRH), the leading provider of building materials, today reported first quarter 2026 financial results. Total revenues of $7.4 billion (Q1 2025: $6.8 billion) were 9% ahead of the prior year driven by positive underlying demand, disciplined commercial execution, and contributions from acquisitions. Net loss of ($0.2) billion (Q1 2025: ($0.1) billion) was higher than the prior year, driven by higher depreciation and impairment charges as well as increased interest expense, net. Adjusted EBITDA* of $0.6 billion (Q1 2025: $0.5 billion) increased by 18% over the prior year, reflecting strong operational discipline and contributions from acquisitions. CRH’s net loss margin of (2.4%) was below the prior year  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.4 billion = 74억 달러; $6.8 billion = 68억 달러; $0.6 billion = 6억 달러; $0.5 billion = 5억 달러; $8.1 = 8.1달러; $8.5 = 8.5달러; $7.4 = 7.4달러; $6.8 = 6.8달러; $0.1 = 0.1달러; $0.2 = 0.2달러; $0.6 = 0.6달러; $0.5 = 0.5달러.

Executive Officer, sta ted 1 “We delivered a strong start to 2026, reflecting good momentum from early-season project activity, disciplined commercial execution and positive contributions from acquisitions. During the quarter, we continued our active portfolio management, reallocating capital into higher-growth, more connected businesses. Notwithstanding the current geopolitical and macroeconomic uncertainty, we are encouraged by the continued strength of underlying demand across our key markets. The outlook for our business remains positive and backed by our superior strategy and connected portfolio we are pleased to reaffirm our financial guidance for 2026, leaving us well positioned for another year of growth and value creation ahead.” Summary Financials Q1 2026 YoY Change Total revenues $7.4bn +9% Net loss ($0.2bn) (84%) Net loss margin (2.4%) (90bps) Adjusted EBITDA* $0.6bn  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.4 = 7.4달러; $0.2 = 0.2달러; $0.6 = 0.6달러.

Adjusted EBITDA margin* 8.0% +70bps Diluted Loss Per Share ($0.27) (80%) Diluted Loss Per Share pre-impairment* ($0.20) (33%) 1 *Represents a non-GAAP financial measure. See 'Non-GAAP Reconciliation and Supplementary Information' on pages 11 to 12. 1 Transactions agreed and remain subject to customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals. Exhibit 99.1 Three months ended March 31, 2026 Americas Materials Solutions' Total revenues were 21% ahead of the first quarter of 2025, driven by strong underlying demand and contributions from acquisitions. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 75% year-over-year, reflecting good commercial execution, disciplined cost management and contributions from acquisitions.
